# errors

HwpApiError 와 그 서브클래스들.

:::{.callout-note}
API 시그니처와 docstring 은 Python 소스에서 자동 생성되어 영문으로 표시됩니다.
:::

# errors.HwpApiError { #hwpapi.errors.HwpApiError }

```python
errors.HwpApiError()
```

Base for every hwpapi-raised exception.

# errors.ConnectionError { #hwpapi.errors.ConnectionError }

```python
errors.ConnectionError()
```

Raised when the HWP COM object can't be dispatched or has died.

# errors.ActionFailedError { #hwpapi.errors.ActionFailedError }

```python
errors.ActionFailedError()
```

Raised when ``HAction.Run`` / ``HAction.Execute`` returns falsy.

# errors.InvalidArgumentError { #hwpapi.errors.InvalidArgumentError }

```python
errors.InvalidArgumentError()
```

Raised for unknown formats, malformed paths, or bad kwargs.

# errors.FileIOError { #hwpapi.errors.FileIOError }

```python
errors.FileIOError()
```

Raised when an open/save/export fails at the filesystem/COM edge.

# errors.wrap_com_error { #hwpapi.errors.wrap_com_error }

```python
errors.wrap_com_error(action_name)
```

Re-raise COM errors inside the block as :class:`ActionFailedError`.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                    | Default    |
|-------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| action_name | str    | Short label for the failing operation — included in the error message so callers can tell ``FileOpen`` from ``FileSaveAsPdf``. | _required_ |

## Example {.doc-section .doc-section-example}

>>> with wrap_com_error("FileOpen"):
...     app.api.Open(path)
